summary: Full stack testing for XAC CRM Lead Activity Timeline feature (iteration 10). Backend: 8/8 pytest tests passed (login, auto-logged lead_created/stage_changed/appointment activities, manual POST /api/activities for whatsapp_sent, GET returns enriched user_name, reverse-chronological order, auth required, seed lead activities). Frontend: Kanban lead-name click and Table lead-name click both open LeadDetailModal showing stage badge, phone/email/source/owner/date/notes and activity timeline with colored icons + user names + relative timestamps. WhatsApp modal still shows 'Open WhatsApp' and logs whatsapp_sent activity. Dashboard, Appointments, Settings pages all intact. Sidebar nav matches spec.
critical_code_review_comments: LeadDetailModal.js is clean and well-structured with proper data-testid attributes (lead-detail-modal, lead-info-section, activity-timeline, activity-{id}, close-lead-detail).

Backend create_activity endpoint currently uses db.leads.update_one({'_id': ObjectId(activity.lead_id)}, ...) which requires lead_id to be a valid ObjectId. Frontend passes lead.id (UUID string for newly created leads via /api/leads POST flow) - verified working in tests because seed leads use ObjectId hex strings. If a lead is created via a path that stores id as UUID only (not ObjectId), the last_contact update silently fails (no exception raised since update_one with no match is a no-op). Non-blocking but worth a consistency review.

Activity auto-log on lead creation uses lead_doc['id'] (line 450) while stage_change auto-log uses path param lead_id (line 594). Both work but the lead schema/id-usage should be unified for maintainability.
Good: GET /api/activities/{lead_id} properly excludes mongodb _id and enriches with user_name via batch user lookup.
Good: Frontend gracefully hides scoring badge when score=0 and notes when empty.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all flows verified: kanban click, table click, modal content, activity timeline, WhatsApp logging)

seed_data_creation: Test lead TEST_Timeline Lead created and deleted as part of pytest fixtures. No persistent test data left behind.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 10 Lead Activity Timeline feature fully verified. Backend endpoints POST /api/activities and GET /api/activities/{lead_id} work correctly and auto-logging hooks fire for: lead_created (create_lead), stage_changed (update_lead with stage field), appointment_booked/appointment_auto_created (create_appointment), deal_closed (create_deal). Frontend LeadDetailModal opens via data-testid=lead-name-{id} in Kanban view and data-testid=table-lead-name-{id} in Table view. Modal testids: lead-detail-modal, lead-info-section, activity-timeline, activity-{activity_id}, close-lead-detail. Test lead 69d1021bcd161f9d4fc9d816 (Tiisetso) confirmed to have 4 activities displaying correctly with colored icons. WhatsApp modal 'Open WhatsApp' button fires axios.post to /api/activities with activity_type=whatsapp_sent. All previous simplification checks from iteration 9 still pass.
